channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Meta's Smart Glasses Embed Face Recognition Code
item.description: Meta has integrated face-recognition technology into its smart glasses app, now on millions of phones. This system identifies individuals using biometric data stored on devices.

item.title: Expert Tips for Capturing Northern Lights with Phone
item.description: With strong northern lights expected, here's how to effectively photograph the aurora using your smartphone. Expert advice ensures you capture stunning images of this natural phenomenon.

item.title: Samsung Cuts Exynos 2600 Chip Usage Amid Price Hikes
item.description: Samsung Mobile is scaling back the Exynos 2600 chip in the Galaxy Z Flip 8 due to soaring costs from Samsung LSI. The company is now relying more on Qualcomm for its upcoming devices.

item.title: Le Mans Ultimate Introduces 2026 Cars and Free DLC
item.description: Le Mans Ultimate has released a free update featuring 2026-spec cars, including Toyota and BMW hypercars, and the first LMP3 outside paid DLC. Exciting new content for racing fans is now available.
